name: Warehouse
description: Maintains per-warehouse on-hand levels from stock movements and raises a low-stock alert when an item crosses its reorder point.
author: FactoryOS

api.description: A tenant's on-hand levels per warehouse item, each flagged against its reorder point; an optional filter narrows to items below reorder.
A tenant's stock rollup: how many items are tracked and how many are below their reorder point.
